channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tanker hit as Iran warns it may quit talks over Trump's threats
item.description: A tanker was struck by a projectile in the Strait of Hormuz as the U.S. and Iran traded threats, with peace negotiations paused.

item.title: Mother who claimed toddlers died from vaccines charged with murder
item.description: A grand jury indicted Andrea Shaw, accused of suffocating her 18-month-old twins, on two counts of first-degree murder.

item.title: Explosions reported in Damascus during Macron's Syria visit, state media says
item.description: Macron is the first major Western leader to visit Syria since the fall of former President Bashar al-Assad in December 2024.

item.title: WATCH: Severe storms and flooding leave trail of destruction
item.description: About 60 million people face flood threats from Ohio to Virginia to Massachusetts on Tuesday.
